SCP 0.1.2.9003
  • Reference

    ExpDotPlot

    ExpDotPlot.Rd

    ExpDotPlot

    ExpDotPlot(
  srt,
  genes = NULL,
  gene_groups = NULL,
  cell_group_by = NULL,
  aggregate_fun = mean,
  slot = "counts",
  assay = "RNA",
  exp_method = c("zscore", "raw", "log2fc", "log1p"),
  lib_normalize = FALSE,
  lib_size = NULL,
  heatmap_palette = "YlOrRd",
  gene_palette = "Paired",
  cell_palette = "Paired",
  add_reticle = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  grid_size = 0.4
)

    Arguments

    srt

    A Seurat object.

    genes

    A vector of gene names to plot.

    gene_groups

    A vector of group names for genes.

    cell_group_by

    Columns used to calculate cell expression. One heatmap per column name.

    assay

    Assay used to calculate the expression.

    exp_method

    Method used to calculate cell expression.

    heatmap_palette

    Heatmap expression palette.

    gene_palette

    Gene group palette.

    cell_palette

    Column palette.

    cluster_rows

    Whether to cluster rows.

    cluster_columns

    Whether to cluster columns.

    grid_size

    size for each dot.

    Examples

    library(dplyr)
data(pancreas1k)
pancreas1k <- RunDEtest(pancreas1k, group_by = "CellType")
#> [2022-06-18 13:06:01] Start DEtest
#> Threads used for DE test: 1
#> Perform FindAllMarkers(wilcox)...
#> 
  |                                                                            
  |                                                                      |   0%
  |                                                                            
  |======================================================================| 100%
#> 
#> [2022-06-18 13:06:19] DEtest done
#> Elapsed time: 18.37 secs 
de_filter <- filter(pancreas1k@tools$DEtest_CellType$AllMarkers_wilcox, p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 1)
de_top <- de_filter %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  top_n(1, avg_log2FC) %>%
  group_by(group1) %>%
  top_n(3, avg_log2FC)
ExpDotPlot(pancreas1k, genes = de_top$gene, gene_groups = de_top$group1, cell_group_by = "CellType")
